series_metadata.series_description: Recording of appointments, schedules and meetings that document the function, location and/or activity of an agency employee, section or group. Records may include: calendars, appointment books, planners, organizers, itineraries and any other records not set out in a schedule that can be described similarly.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain documents for six (6) months from the recorded date or date of last entry. No RC-3 is necessary when destroying these records. ; Paper: Retain documents for six (6) months from the recorded date or date of last entry. No RC-3 is necessary when destroying these records., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
